chunks.title: The Census and God's Anger
chunks.reason: Narrative of David's census command, Joab's objection, and the resulting divine displeasure.

chunks.title: David's Confession and Choice of Punishment
chunks.reason: Dialogue between David, God through Gad, and the selection of three years of famine, months of war, or days of pestilence.

chunks.title: The Angel at Jerusalem
chunks.reason: Description of the angel's position and David's prayer for mercy on the people.

chunks.title: Acquisition of the Threshing Floor
chunks.reason: Narrative of David buying the site from Ornan to build an altar and stop the plague.

chunks.title: The Altar and Divine Fire
chunks.reason: Conclusion of the event with the offering, fire from heaven, and David's decision to stay at Gibeon.
